business_snapshot.value_proposition: AI-assisted support desk that reduces ticket resolution time for mid-market SaaS teams.

icp.primary_icp: B2B SaaS companies (50–500 employees), support teams using Zendesk/Intercom, needing to reduce support costs and improve CSAT.
secondary_segments: Ecommerce brands with high ticket volume
IT service providers with repetitive L1 tickets

goals.core_outcome: Increase qualified demo requests and improve trial-to-paid conversion.

non_negotiables: No misleading claims about AI capabilities
Brand tone must remain professional and credible

known_issues: Attribution unclear between paid and organic
Landing pages not tailored by segment

regional_context.seasonality_notes: Expect demand shifts around Ramadan/Eid; confirm exact dates for the target year.
regional_context.local_compliance_notes: Review local ad policies and claims restrictions for regulated sectors.

data_availability_map.notes: User can share aggregated weekly metrics; no raw PII.
